metadata.title: Term Certificates | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Bank provides a complete range of short term and long term deposit certificates with the flexibility of monthly, quarterly, semi-annual and annual returns.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Term Deposits Riba Free Term Deposit Certificates If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Truly Halal Returns Meezan Bank provides a complete range of short term and long term deposit certificates with the flexibility of monthly, quarterly, semi-annual and annual returns. Monthly Mudarabah Certificate Short-Term Investment with Regular Monthly Returns The Riba-Free Monthly Mudarabah Certificate (MMC) is a short-term deposit product which has been designed to give you expected monthly returns. Learn More Certificate of Islamic Investment Periodic Profit through 3 Months to 1.5 Years Investment The of Islamic Investment (COII) is a Mudarabah-based deposit product through which you can invest your savings for periods ranging from 3 months to 1.5 years and earn Halal profit on a periodic basis. of Islamic Investment - Senior Periodic Profit through One Year your savings for one year basis. Learn More Meezan Amdan Certificate A long-term investment with Monthly High Return Meezan Amdan Certificate (MAC) is a Mudarabah-based long-term deposit product that offers a high expected return to investors and is ideal for those individuals and corporate clients who need a regular stream of monthly income. Meezan Amdan Certificate for Senior Citizens Term Deposit with the comfort of high expected monthly returns Meezan Bank aims to provide best-suited products and services to meet the financial needs for different segments of society. Senior citizens/widows/disabled personnel are an important and priority segment of our society deserving our special attention. Learn More Dollar Mudarabah Certificate An Investment in US Dollars to Earn Halal Profit The Dollar Mudarabah Certificate (DMC) is a can invest your US Dollars with Meezan Bank 3 months to 3 years and earn six-monthly or at maturity profit payments on your investment.
